extra_commands: for f in /var/www/qrbanner/.env /var/www/qrbanner/.env.local /var/www/qrbanner/.env.production /var/www/qrbanner/.env.production.local; do test -f "$f" && echo "--- $f ---" && grep -E '^NEXTAUTH_' "$f" | sed 's/=.*/=<len:'"$(grep -E '^NEXTAUTH_SECRET=' "$f" | cut -d= -f2- | wc -c)"'>/' || true; done
pm2 env 0 2>/dev/null | grep NEXTAUTH || echo NO_PM2_NEXTAUTH
cd /var/www/qrbanner && node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const s=process.env.NEXTAUTH_SECRET||''; console.log('DOTENV_SECRET_LEN', s.length); console.log('DOTENV_URL', process.env.NEXTAUTH_URL);"
